name: TLC Medical Transport Inc
districts_or_customers: Individual NEMT clients throughout Oregon; Salem area
recent_news: No M&A or notable news; small NEMT operator providing door-to-door wheelchair-accessible rides.
fit_notes: Not a school bus operator. ~4 employees, NEMT only (wheelchair vans, door-to-door medical rides). Not a tuck-in fit for Summit's school-bus platform.

name: New Transport Cabulance
districts_or_customers: Hospitals and individual NEMT riders in Mill Creek / greater Seattle area
recent_news: Founded 1997 as a taxi company, evolved into cabulance for limited-mobility passengers; no M&A reported.
fit_notes: Not a school bus operator. Tiny cabulance/NEMT shop (~3 employees, ~$180K revenue). Not a Summit tuck-in fit.

name: Tri-County Cabulance
districts_or_customers: Hospitals, assisted living communities and private clients in King and Snohomish Counties, WA
recent_news: No M&A or notable news; small husband-and-wife cabulance operator.
fit_notes: Not a school bus operator. Wheelchair-van NEMT only; ~3 employees. Not a Summit tuck-in fit.

name: Pampered Auto LLC
districts_or_customers: Individual NEMT clients in Ottawa, Kent, Oceana, Mason and Muskegon Counties, MI; routes to Ann Arbor/Detroit medical centers
recent_news: Originally a 2015 auto-detailing shop; entered NEMT in Jan 2020, named COVID-19 essential business; no M&A.
fit_notes: Not a school bus operator. Small NEMT (wheelchair-van) operator serving western Michigan; ~4 employees. Not a Summit tuck-in fit.
